properties.summary: Cyclopropylmescaline, AKA CPM, is a psychedelic/hallucinogenic that was produced by Alexander Shulgin. It causes visual and auditory hallucinations and is reported to have a long duration. There is limited information on this drug, caution is advised
properties.warning: Caution: There is limited information on how CPM interacts with the body. Caution with usage/dosage is advised.
